- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `type/short-kebab-description` (e.g. `feat/session-join-code`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`)
- [ ] PR title matches the main commit subject
- [ ] `.env.example` + `HOW-TO-RUN.md` updated if env vars or setup steps changed
- [ ] New ADR added under `docs/adr/` for any significant architectural decision
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before requesting review
